scripts.generate:protocol: adi tsp-gen generate ../signaling.tsp -l typescript -s protocol --protocol-tag type --protocol-rename snake_case --protocol-enum-name SignalingMessage -o src/generated/channels
scripts.generate: bun run generate:protocol && cargo check -p signaling-plugin
scripts.build: bun run generate && bun build src/index.ts --outdir ../../../../dist/adi.signaling --entry-naming 'web.[ext]' --format esm --minify --external '@adi-family/*'
